sector.name: Auto Ancillaries
sector.description: Auto component players gaining from content growth

fyPerformance: FY26 revenue stood at ₹3,397 Cr, up 20%

guidance.value: $2 Mn annual value; SOP from Q1FY28

highlights: Core emission business remains steady and strategically important
